content.problemStatement:
You are given an array arrarrarr containing nnn integers. Your task is to return the **majority element**.

A majority element is defined as the element that occurs **more than ⌊n/2⌋⌊n / 2⌋⌊n/2⌋ times**.
It is guaranteed that such an element always exists.

⌊n/2⌋⌊n / 2⌋⌊n/2⌋ => The floor value means if 5 divided by 2 equals 2.5, we’ll choose 2 as the output because of the floor function. 

Follow-up:Can you solve this problem in **O(n)** time complexity while using only **O(1) extra space**?

**Function Declaration****Function Name**majorityElementmajorityElementmajorityElement – Finds the element that appears more than ⌊n/2⌋⌊n / 2⌋⌊n/2⌋ times in the array.

**Parameters**
arrarrarr : A list/array of integers of size nnn.
**Return Value**
Returns an **integer** — the majority element that appears more than half the time in the array.
Constraints:
n==arr.lengthn == arr.lengthn==arr.length
1≤n≤50,0001 \leq n \leq 50,0001≤n≤50,000
−109≤arr[i]≤109-10^9 \leq arr[i] \leq 10^9−109≤arr[i]≤109

Input Format


TTT → number of test cases




For each test case:



Line 1 → nnn (array size)
Line 2 → **n integers** representing the array




Output Format
One value per test case.
